title: HACCP Deviation Cost Calculator
description: Calculates the total cost impact of a HACCP deviation, including direct losses, rework, waste, and compliance penalties, with confidence-adjusted estimates and actionable recommendations.

inputs.label: Deviation Type
inputs.businessContext: Select the category of HACCP deviation to apply appropriate cost multipliers and regulatory thresholds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select the category of HACCP deviation to apply appropriate cost multipliers and regulatory thresholds.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uygun maliyet çarpanları ve düzenleyici eşikleri uygulamak için HACCP sapma kategorisini seçin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie die Kategorie der HACCP-Abweichung aus, um geeignete Kostenmultiplikatoren und regulatorische Schwellenwerte anzuwenden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez la catégorie d'écart HACCP pour appliquer les multiplicateurs de coûts et les seuils réglementaires appropriés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione la categoría de desviación HACCP para aplicar multiplicadores de coste y umbrales regulatorios adecuados.

inputs.label: Affected Batch Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of product that was exposed to the deviation. Used to calculate material loss and rework costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total mass of product that was exposed to the deviation. Used to calculate material loss and rework costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sapmaya maruz kalan toplam ürün kütlesi. Malzeme kaybı ve yeniden işleme maliyetlerini hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtmasse des Produkts, das der Abweichung ausgesetzt war. Wird zur Berechnung von Materialverlust und Nacharbeitskosten verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse totale du produit exposé à l'écart. Utilisée pour calculer la perte de matière et les coûts de retouche.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa total de producto expuesta a la desviación. Se utiliza para calcular la pérdida de material y los costes de retrabajo.

inputs.label: Unit Cost per kg ($)
inputs.businessContext: Standard cost of raw materials per kilogram, including ingredients and packaging.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard cost of raw materials per kilogram, including ingredients and packaging.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İçerik ve ambalaj dahil olmak üzere kilogram başına standart hammadde maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardkosten für Rohmaterialien pro Kilogramm, einschließlich Zutaten und Verpackung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût standard des matières premières par kilogramme, incluant ingrédients et emballage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste estándar de materias primas por kilogramo, incluyendo ingredientes y empaque.

inputs.label: Rework Percentage (%)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated fraction of the affected batch that can be reworked (e.g., reprocessed, repackaged) instead of being scrapped.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated fraction of the affected batch that can be reworked (e.g., reprocessed, repackaged) instead of being scrapped.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Etkilenen partinin hurdaya ayrılmak yerine yeniden işlenebilecek (örneğin, yeniden işlenmiş, yeniden paketlenmiş) tahmini oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Anteil der betroffenen Charge, der nachbearbeitet (z. B. neu verarbeitet, neu verpackt) statt verschrottet werden kann.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fraction estimée du lot affecté pouvant être retravaillée (ex. retransformée, reconditionnée) au lieu d'être mise au rebut.
businessContext_i18n.es: Fracción estimada del lote afectado que puede ser retrabajada (ej., reprocesada, reempaquetada) en lugar de ser desechada.

inputs.label: Rework Cost per kg ($)
inputs.businessContext: Additional cost per kilogram for rework activities (labor, energy, extra materials).

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional cost per kilogram for rework activities (labor, energy, extra materials).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeniden işleme faaliyetleri (işçilik, enerji, ek malzemeler) için kilogram başına ek maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Kosten pro Kilogramm für Nacharbeit (Arbeit, Energie, zusätzliche Materialien).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût supplémentaire par kilogramme pour les activités de retouche (main-d'œuvre, énergie, matières supplémentaires).
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste adicional por kilogramo para actividades de retrabajo (mano de obra, energía, materiales extra).

inputs.label: Downtime (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Total production downtime caused by the deviation, including investigation, cleaning, and corrective actions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total production downtime caused by the deviation, including investigation, cleaning, and corrective actions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sapmadan kaynaklanan toplam üretim durma süresi (araştırma, temizlik ve düzeltici faaliyetler dahil).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Produktionsstillstandszeit durch die Abweichung, einschließlich Untersuchung, Reinigung und Korrekturmaßnahmen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps d'arrêt total de production causé par l'écart, incluant investigation, nettoyage et actions correctives.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo total de inactividad de producción causado por la desviación, incluyendo investigación, limpieza y acciones correctivas.

inputs.label: Hourly Overhead Rate ($/hr)
inputs.businessContext: Burdened overhead cost per hour of production downtime (includes labor, utilities, facility costs).

label_i18n.es: Tasa de gastos generales por hora ($/h)

businessContext_i18n.en: Burdened overhead cost per hour of production downtime (includes labor, utilities, facility costs).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretim duruşu saat başına genel gider maliyeti (işçilik, kamu hizmetleri, tesis maliyetlerini içerir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Belasteter Gemeinkostensatz pro Stunde Produktionsstillstand (einschließlich Arbeit, Betriebskosten, Anlagenkosten).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût de charge complet par heure d'arrêt de production (inclut main-d'œuvre, services publics, coûts d'installation).
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste general por hora de inactividad de producción (incluye mano de obra, servicios públicos, costes de instalaciones).

inputs.label: Regulatory Penalty Applicable?
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if the deviation is likely to trigger a regulatory fine or citation (e.g., FDA, USDA).

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates if the deviation is likely to trigger a regulatory fine or citation (e.g., FDA, USDA).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sapmanın düzenleyici bir para cezası veya ihtarı tetikleme olasılığını belirtir (örn. FDA, USDA).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gibt an, ob die Abweichung wahrscheinlich eine behördliche Geldstrafe oder Anordnung auslöst (z. B. FDA, USDA).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indique si l'écart est susceptible de déclencher une amende ou une citation réglementaire (ex. FDA, USDA).
businessContext_i18n.es: Indica si es probable que la desviación genere una multa o citación regulatoria (ej., FDA, USDA).

rules.message: Base penalty amount should be zero if regulatory penalty flag is false.
Recall costs should be zero if recall flag is false.
Data confidence must be between 0 and 1.

thresholds.message: Total deviation cost exceeds $100,000. Immediate management review recommended.
Waste cost exceeds $50,000. Investigate root cause and implement corrective actions.
Data confidence is low. Consider collecting more accurate data before finalizing cost estimate.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
